items.title_en: Bank of America expects three Fed hikes this year, says inflation is getting 'unambiguously worse'
items.title_zh: 美国银行预计美联储今年将加息三次，称通胀“明显恶化”
items.desc_en: The bank's economists reversed their position held as recently as last week that the central bank would stay on hold this year.
items.desc_zh: 该银行经济学家改变了上周的立场，即央行今年将维持按兵不动。

items.title_en: Child care tax breaks can save families and businesses money — but few use them, congressional report finds
items.title_zh: 国会报告发现，儿童保育税收减免可以为家庭和企业节省资金，但很少有人使用它们
items.desc_en: Child care can be expensive for both parents and their employers. Yet existing tax incentives to help defray those costs may go unused, a new report finds.
items.desc_zh: 对于父母及其雇主来说，儿童保育费用可能很高。然而，一份新报告发现，现有的有助于支付这些成本的税收激励措施可能会被闲置。

items.title_en: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
items.title_zh: 音乐界明星人物克莱夫·戴维斯 (Clive Davis) 去世，享年 94 岁
items.desc_en: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.
items.desc_zh: 戴维斯开启或复兴了贾尼斯·乔普林、惠特尼·休斯顿、卡洛斯·桑塔纳和艾丽西亚·凯斯等超级巨星的职业生涯。

items.title_en: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
items.title_zh: 参议院准备推进住房法案，限制私募股权购买单户住宅
items.desc_en: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.
items.desc_zh: 预计国会参众两院本周将推进一项庞大的住房一揽子计划，旨在创造更多供应并使住房更便宜。

items.title_en: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
items.title_zh: 高调退出后，Alphabet因人工智能担忧而迎来一年来最糟糕的一天
items.desc_en: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌母公司 Alphabet 连续出现了备受瞩目的人工智能研究人员离职。

items.title_en: Micron quadruples year-to-date. Wall Street mostly thinks Wednesday's earnings will live up to the hype
items.title_zh: 今年迄今为止，微米的业绩增长了四倍。华尔街大多认为周三的财报不会辜负炒作
items.desc_en: Several Wall Street firms are considerably above consensus estimates.
items.desc_zh: 几家华尔街公司的业绩远高于市场普遍预期。

items.desc_zh: 这位投资者表示，我似乎看到了减速即将到来。

items.title_en: Twins marry twins in joyous Nigerian joint wedding

items.desc_en: Brothers Taiwo and Kehinde Oguntoye speak to the BBC after getting hitched to twin sisters.

items.title_en: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: Who is Andy Burnham? And 4 other things investors should know as the U.K. replaces its prime minister
items.title_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆是谁？英国更换首相之际投资者还应该了解的其他 4 件事

items.title_en: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.desc_en: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.desc_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title_en: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion

items.desc_zh: 该市主要液化天然气（LNG）加工基地位于拉斯拉凡工业区遭遇“技术事故”。

items.title_en: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
items.title_zh: Meta 的 WhatsApp 负责人辞职，由印度金融科技创始人 Kunal Shah 接任

items.title_en: Alan Greenspan, architect of the modern American economy, dies aged 100
items.title_zh: 现代美国经济的建筑师艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.desc_en: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.
items.desc_zh: 作为美联储主席，艾伦·格林斯潘成为世界上最引人注目的银行家。

items.title_en: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.desc_en: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.desc_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.desc_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉似乎以微弱优势击败了他的竞争对手伊万·塞佩达，后者表示初步统计“尚未正式或具有约束力”。

items.desc_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。
